# Support

Use the documentation first:

- install: [docs/install/INSTALL.md](../docs/install/INSTALL.md);
- user manual: [docs/install/USER-MANUAL.html](../docs/install/USER-MANUAL.html);
- command triggers: [docs/install/COMMAND-TRIGGERS.md](../docs/install/COMMAND-TRIGGERS.md);
- adapter matrix: [docs/adapters/ADAPTER-CAPABILITY-MATRIX.md](../docs/adapters/ADAPTER-CAPABILITY-MATRIX.md);
- current roadmap: [docs/roadmap/README.md](../docs/roadmap/README.md).

## Asking For Help

When opening an issue, include:

- TES version;
- operating system;
- active runtime route: Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, or all;
- command or prompt used;
- final certification status;
- sanitized error output.

Do not include secrets, private code, raw Field Reports payloads, or private repository paths.

## Known Partial Surfaces

Some surfaces are intentionally not claimed as fully live production behavior:

- real GitHub issue publication for Field Reports;
- marketplace publication or submission;
- live platform plugin activation;
- optional vector/Xenova certification;
- write-capable MCP behavior.

Ask for support using the certified local/fake replay path unless a maintainer explicitly requests a live transport reproduction.
